ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., vehicle, smart traffic sensor) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device owner (e.g., transportation agency, ride-hailing company) */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., transportation agency, ride-hailing company) */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone number, email) of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device providing the GPS data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the GPS location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the GPS location */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GPS data was recorded */,
  "leaving_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device left the GPS location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the device when the GPS data was recorded */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the device when the GPS data was recorded */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data_clusters" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPS data point */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the GPS data point belongs to */,
  "cluster_assignment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GPS data was assigned to the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id", "cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic signal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic signal (e.g., green, red, yellow) */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., fixed-time, traffic-actuated) */,
  "signal_control_type" TEXT /* Type of control used for the traffic signal (e.g., timer, sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signal_timing" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal timing */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic signal */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the traffic signal timing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the traffic signal timing */,
  "timing_type" TEXT /* Type of timing used for the traffic signal (e.g., fixed-time, dynamic) */,
  "timing_cycle_length" INTEGER /* Length of the timing cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signal_timing_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES traffic_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Current humidity */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Current weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of weather data collection */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the time of weather data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival, parade) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_closures" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road closure */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the road closure */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the road closure */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the road closure */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the road closure */,
  "closure_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the road closure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., GPS data, traffic signal data) */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was sent */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data provided in response to the request */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the data response (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Message accompanying the data response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of analytical model (e.g., regression, clustering) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analytical model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analytical model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytical model */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytical model */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model result */,
  "result_visualization" TEXT /* Visualization (e.g., chart, graph) accompanying the model result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytical_models ("model_id")
)
